message.content:
Based on my analysis of loan application APP-2024-8871, I have reached the following determination:

The application for $50,000 home renovation has been reviewed against our lending criteria. The applicant's credit score of 720 meets our minimum threshold, and the debt-to-income ratio appears acceptable based on the stated income.

```json
{
  "explainability_metadata": {
    "decision_outcome": "approved",
    "confidence_score": 0.87,
    "reasoning": [
      "Credit score 720 exceeds minimum threshold of 650",
      "Annual income $85,000 supports requested loan amount",
      "Debt-to-income ratio within acceptable range",
      "Home renovation purpose qualifies for standard rate"
    ],
    "human_review_required": false
  }
}
```

The loan is approved for the requested amount of $50,000.
